_instructions.usage: Copy this file to clients/[slug].input.json, fill in all fields, remove this _instructions block, then run: npx ts-node scripts/provision-client.ts --input clients/[slug].input.json
_instructions.prerequisite_railway: Before running: create a Railway project in the client's account, add 3 services named exactly 'Sera Worker', 'Sera Dashboard', 'Sera API', generate railway.app domains for Sera API and Sera Dashboard, then generate a project-scoped token (Railway Dashboard > project settings > Tokens) and paste it in railwayToken below.
_instructions.slug: kebab-case client identifier, e.g. verdana-commons. Used for manifest filename.
_instructions.tenantId: Short uppercase identifier written to Processing Events, e.g. VERDANA
_instructions.notionParentPageId: ID from the Notion page URL where the databases will be created. Extract from URL: notion.so/workspace/Page-Title-XXXXXXXXXX — the last 32 chars without dashes. Create a blank page named '[Client] Living Memory Hub' and share it with the Notion integration first.
_instructions.notionApiKey: From notion.so/my-integrations — create a new integration for this client workspace, copy the Internal Integration Secret, share the parent page with it.
_instructions.rootsEmail: The actual IMAP capture inbox address the Sera worker reads from. Must be a standard IMAP-accessible mailbox (Gmail, Google Workspace, or any provider with cloud IMAP). If the client's preferred public address is Proton Mail, set rootsEmail to the Google Workspace forwarding address (e.g. client@saberra.com) and set up Proton Mail forwarding as a manual step.
_instructions.adminEmail: Client human inbox for review alerts and access request notifications. Must differ from rootsEmail.
_instructions.imapHost: IMAP server hostname. Gmail/Google Workspace: imap.gmail.com | Outlook/M365: outlook.office365.com | Fastmail: imap.fastmail.com. NOTE: Proton Mail requires Bridge (a local daemon) and is NOT compatible with cloud-hosted workers — use forwarding to Gmail/Workspace instead.
_instructions.imapPassword: App password, not the account password. Gmail/Workspace: myaccount.google.com/apppasswords (requires 2FA enabled). Other providers: check their security settings for app-specific passwords.
_instructions.googleClientId: From Google Cloud Console — OAuth 2.0 Client ID (Desktop app type). Must have Drive v3, Docs v1, and Gmail v1 scopes enabled.
_instructions.googleClientSecret: From Google Cloud Console — OAuth 2.0 Client Secret.
_instructions.googleRefreshToken: Run: npx ts-node scripts/google-auth.ts --client-id YOUR_ID --client-secret YOUR_SECRET then paste the printed GOOGLE_REFRESH_TOKEN value here. This token never expires unless revoked.
_instructions.governingPurpose: Optional. Client's Governing Purpose Statement — the full text. Sera scores every decision and task against this statement for purpose alignment. Leave empty string if none.
_instructions.communityLayer: true to create all 24 databases including Tensions/Agreements/Gratitudes/Events/Retrospectives/Resources. false for core 18 only (automation DBs always created).
_instructions.claudeModel: Leave as claude-sonnet-4-6 unless client is on enterprise tier.
_instructions.sensitiveReviewParentPageId: Optional but strongly recommended for production. ID of a page in a SEPARATE admin-only Notion workspace where the Sensitive Review database will be created. If omitted, Sensitive Review is created in the main hub page — which is less secure.
_instructions.railwayToken: Project-scoped Railway token for the client's Railway project. Generate from: Railway Dashboard > project > Settings > Tokens > Create token. This token is written here for provisioning only — never commit this file.
_instructions.railwayProjectId: The Railway project ID. Found in the project URL: railway.app/project/PROJECT_ID or in project Settings.
_instructions.seraApiUrl: The railway.app domain for the Sera API service, e.g. https://sera-api-production-xxxx.up.railway.app. Generate in Railway Dashboard: Sera API service > Settings > Networking > Generate Domain.
_instructions.seraDashboardUrl: The railway.app domain for the Sera Dashboard service, e.g. https://dashboard-production-xxxx.up.railway.app. Generate in Railway Dashboard: Sera Dashboard service > Settings > Networking > Generate Domain.
